examples: When I think of the word polecat I think of someone with a southern accent saying it.
The polecat is a member of the weasel family that lives free over most of Europe but it is also a pet.
The polecat is just as much a sneak and a thief as it’s domesticated cousin and the name reflects that.
Egbert Roscoe Murrow was born on April 24, 1908, at Polecat Creek in Guilford County, North Carolina.
